amendment.description: In the nature of a substitute.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5823 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 85 - 5. Record Vote Number: 182.

action.text: Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Amendment SA 5823 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Scott SC. (consideration: CR S2815) In the nature of a substitute.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5823 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 85 - 5. Record Vote Number: 182.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Amendment SA 5823 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 85 - 5. Record Vote Number: 182.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5823 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Scott SC.
